title: +ooctag — live demo
description: Personal OOC tag override: each player can set their own literal tag string (decoration + MUSH color codes included). Admins own the default in theme.ooc.tag.

steps.note: With no argument, +ooctag shows the effective tag and whether it's from your personal override or the theme default.
ooc messages use the admin's theme tag when no personal override is set.
Pass a full literal — brackets, color codes, anything. It renders verbatim.

steps.cmd: ooc Now in bright yellow brackets.

steps.note: Use whatever shape fits your character voice.
reset (or clear) drops you back to the theme default.
